# BOOM Rome

> BOOM is a premium mid-term apartment rental platform and agency for Rome, built for international tenants — expats, international students and remote workers. It is part portal, part agency: video-verified listings plus a human team that finds, verifies, negotiates and manages the entire rental. Tenants move in within 48 hours, with transparent all-in pricing, English contracts and zero hidden fees.

## What BOOM does
- Verified apartment listings with 360° video tours and transparent, all-inclusive pricing.
- 48-hour move-in from approval, a 2-minute online application, and 24/7 WhatsApp support.
- Legal contracts in English, deposit protection, and utilities set up before you arrive.

## Services
- [Apartments](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments): Browse video-verified mid-term rentals in Rome.
- [How It Works](https://www.boomrome.com/how-it-works): The 7-step process from first click to keys in hand.
- [Property Finding](https://www.boomrome.com/property-finding): We find and negotiate your apartment for €350 (deducted from the agency fee, refundable if no match), including off-market properties.
- [Virtual Viewing](https://www.boomrome.com/virtual-viewing): Live video apartment tours with HD photos and an honest report, from €89.
- [Deal Assistance](https://www.boomrome.com/deal-assistance): Contract review, landlord verification and price negotiation for an apartment you found yourself, €249.
- [Concierge](https://www.boomrome.com/concierge): End-to-end relocation support.

## Who it is for
International tenants moving to Rome for the medium term (1 to 12+ months): expats, international students (e.g. LUISS, Sapienza, John Cabot, Roma Tre), remote workers and relocating professionals who cannot navigate Rome's rental market in Italian.

## Key facts
- Coverage: Rome, Italy.
- Move-in speed: as fast as 48 hours from approval.
- Pricing: transparent, all fees included, no hidden costs.
- Language: English-first service.
- Company: Egidi Immobiliare S.r.l., P.IVA 17322991005, Rome, Italy.
